tags.name: `mc-split-button`
tags.description:
Purpose: Integrates a main action button (`mc-button`) with a dropdown menu (`mc-menu`), allowing users to easily perform the main action and choose from additional options, all within a single, space-saving component.
Category: Actions, Navigation
When to use: Use when you want to present a main action (e.g., "Save", "Download") and offer additional options via a dropdown, reducing clutter and grouping related actions together.
When not to use: Avoid when only one action is needed, or when all actions should be equally visible and accessible as separate buttons.
Works with components: mc-list, mc-list-item
Alternative component names: Dropdown Button, Action Menu Button

Events:

  * ``click`` {`MouseEvent`} - Emitted when the button is clicked

  * ``focus`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button receives focus

  * ``blur`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button loses focus

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot for the button label. Used to display custom text/HTML content in the button.

  * ``icon`` {} - The icon HTML to use for the button.

  * ``menu`` {} - Content for the dropdown menu. Pass <mc-list> with <mc-list-item> elements and bind events directly to mc-list (e.g.,

attributes.name: on`click`
attributes.description: ``click`` {`MouseEvent`} - Emitted when the button is clicked

attributes.name: on`focus`
attributes.description: ``focus`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button receives focus

attributes.name: on`blur`
attributes.description: ``blur`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button loses focus
